core_principles: Paper-like Tactility: The digital interface should feel like high-quality cardstock.
Emotional Typography: Fonts are the primary visual element.
Functional Elegance: Admin panels should be beautiful but density-optimized.
Fusion: Classic Wedding Stationery x Modern Crowdfunding Platform

button.primary: bg-[#5D7B93] text-white hover:bg-[#2C445A] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-serif transition-all duration-300 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1
button.secondary: border border-[#C5A065] text-[#8A6D3B] hover:bg-[#F7F5F0] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-serif transition-all
button.ghost: text-[#5D7B93] hover:text-[#2C445A] hover:bg-transparent font-sans uppercase tracking-widest text-xs

ui_primitives.input: bg-white/50 border-b border-[#C5A065]/30 focus:border-[#C5A065] rounded-none px-0 py-4 font-serif text-xl placeholder:text-slate-300 focus:ring-0 transition-colors bg-transparent
ui_primitives.card: bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] rounded-xl p-8

InvitationEnvelope.description: A container that simulates opening an envelope. Use framer-motion to slide the 'flap' up.
InvitationEnvelope.style: bg-[#F7F5F0] shadow-2xl max-w-2xl mx-auto my-12 relative overflow-hidden

RSVPWizard.description: Multi-step form. Step 1: Name, Step 2: Attendance, Step 3: Guests, Step 4: Message.
RSVPWizard.style: Minimalist inputs, large typography, smooth transitions between steps.

GiftCard.description: Product card for registry items. Shows image, price, and 'Gift This' button.
GiftCard.style: Clean image aspect-ratio, elegant typography for item name.

VaquinhaBar.style: Height: 8px, rounded-full. Fill color: Gold Gradient. Background: Slate-100.

public_pages.structure: Single Column (Mobile First) -> Max Width 4xl on Desktop
public_pages.background_layer: Fixed position paper texture overlay with mix-blend-mode: multiply opacity-30
public_pages.spacing: Gap-12 or Gap-24 between sections. Extensive white space.

admin_pages.grid: Bento Grid for Dashboard (Stats), Table View for Guests/Gifts
admin_pages.style: Clean, dense, utilitarian but using the brand fonts for headers.

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure Gold text is dark enough (#8A6D3B) on light backgrounds. Do not use light gold text on white.
accessibility.focus_states: Focus ring should be Gold (#C5A065) with an offset.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css immediately.
2. THEME SETUP: Update tailwind.config.js with the custom color palette defined above.
3. ASSETS: Create a distinct 'PaperOverlay' component that sits fixed at z-0 to give the texture to the whole app.
4. RSVP LOGIC: Ensure the 'Guest' addition logic allows dynamic addition of multiple family members.
5. ADMIN: Protect /admin routes with a simple hardcoded login first (User wants 'ID unique and password').
6. USE SHADCN: Use Shadcn UI for the Admin Panel tables, dialogs, and forms, but styled with the custom CSS variables.
7. UNIVERSAL: Apply the 'E1' design principles—asymmetry in the landing page, texture over flat colors, and emotive typography.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for dark colors.
Avoid 'Inter' font for headings; use Cormorant Garamond.
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
